title_jp: スター・ウォーズ ナイツ オブ ザ オールド リパブリック
title_en: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic
sales_world: ~3M lifetime; Steam owners 500K-1M plus mobile/Switch re-releases
popularity: The most-acclaimed Star Wars RPG ever made; still sells consistently on every Star Wars sale and is the active subject of a much-delayed remake.
